definition.summary: Restore a tiered volume's .dat from remote storage back to the local volume server.
definition.description: Reverse of tier_upload. Used for crash recovery, planned tier-back, or when access pattern flips hot. After completion the volume serves reads locally and the remote object can be optionally deleted.

params.name: delete_remote
params.doc: Delete remote object after successful download

preconditions.doc: Volume must currently have RemoteStorageName set
Local disk has room for full .dat
